seeded_geospatial_index.description: live Convex dev with the 5,654-row catalog where the top scenic North Carolina route has compositeScore > 0 and non-zero dimension scores

would_fail_if: option reads route.score (undefined→0) so composite is 0
dimensions read route.scores.* (undefined→0) so all bars are 0

steps: call listCuratedRoutes {archetypes:['scenic'], state:'North Carolina', sort:'best', limit:5} and record the top route's compositeScore + dimension *Score values
run runDiscoverCuratedRoutes with the SAME fixtured intent
load the created route_plans row's first option.scores

must_observe: option.scores.composite === the queried route's real compositeScore
≥1 dimension score > 0 matching the queried route's real *Score

scenario.verification_service: live Convex dev (discoverCuratedRoutes → listCuratedRoutes → route_plans options)

would_fail_if: best-sort option fabricates distanceMeters=0 as a real value
nearest-sort option drops the real distance

steps: compare the two options' distance fields

must_observe: nearest option carries a distance derived from a real distanceMi > 0
must_not_observe: best option presents distanceMeters as a real 0

scenario.verification_service: live Convex dev (discoverCuratedRoutes options for best vs nearest)
